Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate user is able to export the Bulk Assignments and validate data in the exported file is accurate

Step Action: Login to the test environment
Step Expected: User is logged in and the Home page displays

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: The Bulk Assignments List page displays

Step Action: Fill in the required fields as desired for the test and click on Run Query
Step Expected: Bulk Assignments List page displays with the filtered records

Step Action: Click on the Export button and save the file
Validate the file is saved in an excel format
Open the exported file and validate the data in the file matches with the filtered data in the UI
Logout of the testing environment

Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate the fields in Location Bulk Assignments and validate the user can assign the location

Step Action: Login to the test environment
Step Expected: User is logged in and the Home page displays

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: The Bulk Assignments List page displays

Step Action: Fill in the required fields as desired for the test and click on Run Query
Step Expected: Bulk Assignments List page displays with the filtered records

Step Action: Select 1 or more records and click on the Assign Location button in the Bulk Assignments list
Validate the Assignment Type is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the list of available Assignment Types
Validate the Location  is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the list of available locations
Validate Effective Start Date is a required date field
Validate Note is a text field which only allows 10000 characters by attempting to add more and receiving an error message
Fill in data in all the required fields and click on Continue
Step Expected: A confirmation modal displays with the text: "You are about to assign a location to the selected member records. Would you like to continue?"

Step Action: Click on Continue and validate the status of the assignment is displayed
Click on the Close button and validate the changes are applied as per the status in step 10
Logout of the testing environment

Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate the fields in Staff Member Bulk Assignments and validate the user can assign the staff

Step Action: Login to the test environment
Step Expected: User is logged in and the Home page displays

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: The Bulk Assignments List page displays

Step Action: Fill in the required fields as desired for the test and click on Run Query
Step Expected: Bulk Assignments List page displays with the filtered records

Step Action: Select 1 or more records and click on the Assign Staff button in the Bulk Assignments list
Step Expected: Staff Member Bulk Assignments modal displays

Step Action: Validate the Assignment Type is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the list of available Assignment Types
Validate the Staff Member is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the list of available staff members
Validate the Location  is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the list of available locations
Validate Effective Start Date is a required date field
Validate Note is a text field which only allows 10000 characters by attempting to add more and receiving an error message
Validate the "Is Primary Assignment" is a check box that is not required field
Fill in data in all the required fields and click on Continue
Step Expected: A confirmation modal displays with the text: "You are about to assign a staff member to the selected member records. Would you like to continue?"

Step Action: Click on Continue and validate the status of the assignment is displayed
Click on the Close button and validate the changes are applied as per the status in step 12
Logout of the testing environment

Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate the fields in Location Bulk Unassignments and validate the user can unassign the location

Step Action: Login to the test environment
Step Expected: User is logged in and the Home page displays

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: The Bulk Assignments List page displays

Step Action: Fill in the required fields as desired for the test and click on Run Query
Step Expected: Bulk Assignments List page displays with the filtered records

Step Action: Select 1 or more records and click on the Unassign Location button in the Bulk Assignments list

Validate the Discharge Reason is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the below values:
 
Deceased
Required higher level of care
Declined Services
Terminated Services
Transferred
Other
Validate if Discharge Reason is Other, the Other (Discharge Reason) single select drop down field is displayed which is a required field
Validate Notes is a text field which only allows 10000 characters by attempting to add more and receiving an error message
Fill in data in all the required fields and click on Continue
Step Expected: A confirmation modal displays with the text: "You are about to unassign location from the selected member records. Would you like to continue?"

Step Action: Click on Continue and validate the status of the assignment is displayed
Click on the Close button and validate the changes are applied as per the status in step 9
Logout of the testing environment

Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate the fields in Staff Member Bulk Unassignments and validate the user can unassign the staff

Step Action: Login to the test environment
Step Expected: User is logged in and the Home page displays

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: The Bulk Assignments List page displays

Step Action: Fill in the required fields as desired for the test and click on Run Query
Step Expected: Bulk Assignments List page displays with the filtered records

Step Action: Select 1 or more records and click on the Unassign Staff button in the Bulk Assignments list
Step Expected: Staff Member Bulk Unassignments modal displays

Step Action:
Validate the Unassign Reason is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the below values:
 
Deceased
Department involuntarily ends services/ termination due to no contact
Moved out of State and chose to terminate services
Moved to Nursing Facility
No longer chooses to receive services
No longer eligible for Medicaid
Other
Services not used
Termination of Gx/Cx and does not receive services
Validate if Unassign Reason is Other, the Other (Unassign Reason) single select drop down field is displayed which is a required field
Validate Notes is a text field which only allows 10000 characters by attempting to add more and receiving an error message
Fill in data in all the required fields and click on Continue
Step Expected: A confirmation modal displays with the text: "You are about to unassign staff member from the selected member records. Would you like to continue?"

Step Action: Click on Continue and validate the status of the assignment is displayed
Click on the Close button and validate the changes are applied as per the status in step 9
Logout of the testing environment
